author: nullchinchilla
message:
Add Play in-app review prompter; bump versionCode to 11224

Adds ReviewPrompter/ReviewPromptState with per-flavor factories (Play
flavor uses the Play in-app review API; APK/debug flavors no-op) and
the com.google.android.play:review dependency. Includes regenerated
baseline profiles and output metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: nullchinchilla
message:
Support switching exits while connected via in-place engine restart

The server picker calls set_exit_constraint while connected, which
Android never implemented (undefined on the native gate). Implement it
as an in-place engine swap: the persisted DaemonArgs get the new exit,
and the VPN service (separate process, reached via a new
ACTION_RESTART_ENGINE intent) kills and respawns the geph5-client child
under the live tun. The VpnService and tun stay up throughout, so
traffic blackholes rather than leaks during the gap — the moral
equivalent of the desktop manager's leak-free reconnect. The caller
uses the engine's start_time RPC as the ack that the *new* engine is up.

Supporting fixes in TunnelManager:
- the crash watchdog only tears the service down if the engine that
  exited is still the current one;
- the API<26 stdio pumps capture the engine instance they serve (and no
  longer close streams over the shared tun fd, or crash the app via an
  uncaught IOException when the engine dies mid-write);
- on API 26+ the tun lives on the app's fd 0, so a respawned child
  inherits it with no extra fd work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: nullchinchilla
message:
Optional local-proxy config + LAN address RPC for the new gephgui

- DaemonArgs: listen_all is replaced by proxy: ProxyArgs? (autoconf,
  listen_all, socks5_port, http_port); null means the engine binds no
  proxy ports (the listen keys are omitted from the child config, same
  as the old listen_all=false path). Custom ports and localhost binds
  are now honored.
- New get_lan_addresses RPC verb (non-loopback IPv4s) for the GUI's
  listen-on-all-interfaces display; exposed in init.js along with
  supports_proxy_mode.
- Bump gephgui to the vpn-by-default branch.

Note: MainActivity.kt also carries some unrelated in-flight
review-prompter hunks that were already in the working tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
